ui.more_maid_interaction.title: Maid Interaction
ui.more_maid_interaction.tip: Click an event first. Gift mode: right-click to stage items, then click execute.
ui.more_maid_interaction.preview_default: Click an event card to open details and actions.
ui.more_maid_interaction.gift_drop_tip: Hold an item and right-click drop zone. Shift+right-click adds full stack.
event_detail.more_maid_interaction.knee_: Intimate comfort event. Deeper emotion curves and branches will be connected next.
event_detail.more_maid_interaction.gift: Gift event: stage items by right-clicking, then execute. Payload fields are passed to Maidscript.
event_detail.more_maid_interaction.headp: Light positive feedback event for daily routines and relation stability.
event_detail.more_maid_interaction.feed: Care event. Future versions will link hunger, time, and preference memory.
message.more_maid_interaction.ui_missing: Failed to load interaction panel resource. Check AUI resource path.
message.more_maid_interaction.too_far: Too far from maid, event rejected.
message.more_maid_interaction.gift_no_it: Your main hand has no valid item.
message.more_maid_interaction.gift_execu: Gift failed: no deliverable items or maid inventory is full.
message.more_maid_interaction.gift_total: Gift total count reached the limit.
message.more_maid_interaction.gift_disti: Gift type count reached the limit.
message.more_maid_interaction.gift_not_e: Not enough matching items in inventory for staging.
